items.title: Spain’s Young Core Makes Them ‘Dangerous’ After World Cup Win, Says Kasper Schmeichel
items.summary: Spain deserves all of the praise for its World Cup final victory over Argentina on Sunday, according to FOX Sports' "World Cup Now."
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: World Cup quiz: Can you name every winner?
items.summary: With the World Cup final taking place on Sunday, put your knowledge of the previous winners to the test.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Gill puts spotlight on India's fitness record
items.summary: India's captain said the squad will need greater resilience for when next year's World Cup comes around
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
